subcodes.first_line: At this hour, which is four o'clock on Thursday, the twenty-sixth of the sacred month of Dhi'l-Hijjih, it is Our intention [3.5s]... ...At all times hath union and association been well-pleasing in the sight of God, and separation and dissension abhorred. Hold fast unto that which God loveth and is His command unto you
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین که ساعت چهار از یوم پنجشنبه بیست و ششم شهر ذی الحجه الحرام است قصد
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @justice and mercy, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
